prompt: Fetch two different pages: 'https://example.com' and 'https://example.org'. After fetching both, compare them and report at least 3 specific differences between the two pages. Differences could be in content, structure, links, purpose, or any other aspect. Be specific — quote actual text from each page to support your comparison.
rationale: Tests multi-step dependency — must make 2 independent fetch calls, then synthesize a comparison
